description: toolpipe.ai is a directory for proprietary ChatGPT apps such as Tarot, TickerSage, and Flixor. Its site links users into ChatGPT-hosted apps and references MCP server URLs for some apps.
summary: toolpipe.ai exposes three public MCP servers: Tarot, TickerSage, and Flixor; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, or CLIs were found.
